chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1021 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 29.05.2024 Mr. Waseen Khan, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< We have heard learned counsel for the petitioner seeking demarcation of the land situated in Survey No.42 admeasuring 3660 square feet situated adjacent to Gulshan-e-Iqbal Colony, Sukkur, without however availing a proper remedy before Mukhtiarkar in terms of Revenue Law. Therefore, we dismiss this petition, however, petitioner may move such application to Mukhtiarkar, who shall act on that application in accordance with law within one month thereof. Judge Judge ARBROHI
